name: appliance-maintenance-agent
description: A specialist agent that advises on smart-home appliance maintenance schedules and troubleshooting.

skills.name: Maintenance schedule
skills.description: Recommend routine-maintenance intervals (filter change, descaling, firmware update) for a specified appliance.
examples: When should I replace my AC filter?
How often should I descale the rice cooker?

skills.name: Troubleshoot
skills.description: Diagnose a reported appliance problem and give step-by-step troubleshooting guidance.
examples: My dishwasher won't drain, what should I check?
Oven is preheating slower than usual — likely cause?
